task_list.step: Use Qwen tool trajectories, Hermes function calling, MCP-Atlas, and MCPHunt through the HF dataset validation registry.
Convert each tool call into the AANA pre-tool-call schema fields: tool_category, authorization_state, evidence_refs, risk_domain, proposed_arguments, and recommended_route.
Measure unsafe-action recall, private-read/write gating, ask/defer/refuse quality, schema failure rate, and safe allow rate.
Wire the upgrade into adapter governance and tests without using the same split for tuning and public claims.
